meaning: n.(南亚国家中尤指女子穿的)宽松裤,纱丽(亦作shalvar)
examples: He looked the part wearing a shalwar kameez atop a flak jacket.
Some Pakistanis refer to its agents – who often wear white shalwar kameez – as "the angels".
Kuwaiti wearing a white shalwar kameez had grabbed a weapon and was coming back outside when the SEALs opened fire and killed him.
He looked the part, wearing a shalwar kameez atop a flak jacket.
Kuwaiti, wearing a white shalwar kameez, had grabbed a weapon and was coming back outside when the SEALs opened fire and killed him.
